lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to size the cabin suite, shield and FSD for the passenger fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Asp Explorer ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout and passenger-cabin module sizes underpinning the loadout and berth count.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Asp Explorer shipyard page — hull stats, passenger-cabin capacity, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Asp Explorer lore, manufacturer, and passenger-role context backing the dossier write-up.
